group_1.textCenter: "Magical Girls are inherently superior to humans."
Announcing this to the public@and forcing people to obey...
That plan, initiated by Himena and@the Neo-Magius, ended in failure.
Himena had created a terrifying trap that could've@wiped out all magical girls in Kamihama...

group_1.textLeft: I was gonna take advantage of everyone,
but when I found out that all of Neo-Magius@was still here in Kamihama,
I couldn't press the button.
And then you showed up.
I was so happy, I couldn't even breathe.@My chest got all tight...
I can't hurt anyone easily anymore...
But I'll never know when I might fly off the handle.
Stay with me, Sasha...and everyone else, too...

group_1.textCenter: As a result, all the Kimochi Stones@were gathered.
And, we also found out how to reclaim the@Automatic Purification System.
At last, all these Magical Girls who@share the same vision were united.
We finally had some peace and quiet time.
I knew I couldn't waste this opportunity.
Surely everyone has something to talk about right@now...
I want to listen to what they have to say...@And, I want to leave a record of it...!
So, I went to various locations to conduct interviews.

group_1.textLeft: You're going to write about me again, huh...
I'm glad you're recording this.
Because I can tell you about the mistakes I've@made, and convey my own foolishness...
...Ah...I'm sorry, I didn't mean that sarcastically.
Those are genuinely my honest feelings right now.
I want this to be a lesson not just for me,@but for anyone else reading.
However, I'm not sure how I should explain it...

group_1.textRight: I think it would be difficult to explain@in chronological order, so...
Let's start by being straightforward.@Summarizing is my job, after all.

group_1.textLeft: Right...

group_1.textRight: Is it okay if I ask the questions?

group_1.textLeft: Yes, definitely.

group_1.textRight: How are the members of Promised Blood doing@now?

group_1.textLeft: Us?
After the incident with Himena Aika was over,@we returned to Futatsugi City.
After all, we still have to go to school.
But ever since then, I've been visiting Kamihama@City...
And meeting up with other Magical Girls...
Most of it is just trivial stuff.
But, I think it's important that we interact with each@other...
By doing so, I can look forward to the future.
I wonder if for the first time, I'll be able to create it.

group_1.textRight: What do you want to create?

group_1.textLeft: Hm...
I guess you could say I want@to create a "brighter future."

group_1.textRight: ...Was it Iroha that made you start to think this way?

group_1.textLeft: Yeah, of course.
But, something happened that made me feel@even more strongly about it.
It was quite the journey, but...
